prompt: A polished Japanese animated film poster in a soft, luminous springtime anime style. The main scene shows 2 teenage schoolgirls walking hand in hand down a quiet residential street lined with blooming cherry blossom trees. They wear matching Japanese sailor school uniforms: white long-sleeve blouses with navy sailor collars, pale blue neckerchiefs, and dark navy pleated skirts, each carrying a navy school bag. The girl on the left has dark hair tied in a low side bun with loose strands and a small pink cherry blossom hairpin; she turns toward the other girl with a tender, slightly wistful expression. The girl on the right has long straight dark hair and looks back at her softly. Pink sakura petals drift through warm late-afternoon backlight, creating a romantic, emotional atmosphere with glowing rim light, gentle lens bloom, and painterly detail. Along the left edge, add a vertical collage of 7 inset memory scenes from the story: 1) two children together in a nostalgic childhood moment, 2) a close portrait of the long-haired girl, 3) the two characters standing apart in a tense or reflective moment, 4) an indoor conversation scene with 3 people, 5) a close profile of the bun-haired girl, 6) an intimate almost-kiss close-up of the two leads, 7) a rear view of the two girls walking together beneath cherry blossoms. At the top, include the Japanese tagline: 「変わってしまった朝、変わらなかった想い。」 Across the lower center, place the large glowing handwritten title Story of U in elegant pink neon script. Beneath it, add small Japanese subtitle text and a release line reading 2027年春公開. At the very bottom, add dense small white Japanese credits in authentic movie-poster layout. Overall mood: bittersweet yuri coming-of-age drama, cinematic key visual, emotionally resonant, highly detailed, pastel pink and navy palette, vertical poster composition.
